# NZ Family Travel

NZ Family Travel is an independent travel planning site for New Zealand families.
We publish honest destination guides, itineraries, costs, and tips for families travelling in NZ.

## What We Cover

- NZ destination guides with real costs, best ages, and top family activities
- Day-by-day family itineraries (3 to 14 days) with drive times and budget breakdowns
- Campervan comparisons: Jucy, Maui, Britz, Mighty from $89/day
- Activities by destination: bungy, skyline, thermal pools, wildlife parks
- School holidays calendar (NZ 2024-2026)
- Weather by month matrix for all major NZ regions
- Holiday park finder
- Overseas family travel guides: Bali, Thailand, Japan, Fiji, Australia
- Free packing lists, budget calculators, and travel tips

## Key Pages

- Destinations hub: https://nzfamilytravel.co.nz/destinations/
- Itineraries hub: https://nzfamilytravel.co.nz/itineraries/
- Campervans guide: https://nzfamilytravel.co.nz/campervans/
- Activities hub: https://nzfamilytravel.co.nz/activities/
- School holidays: https://nzfamilytravel.co.nz/school-holidays/
- NZ weather by month: https://nzfamilytravel.co.nz/weather/
- Travel tips & guides: https://nzfamilytravel.co.nz/travel-tips/

## About

Written by NZ parents for NZ families. We earn a small commission on some referrals — this never affects our recommendations.
Contact: hello@nzfamilytravel.co.nz
